title: Furina Themed PvP Texture Pack

# Furina Themed PvP Texture Pack
------
## Changings
### Textures
- No Pumpkin Blur
- Custom Furina based Inventory Hud
- Custom Furina Totem of Undying
- Custom Highlighted Furina based Mace

### Performance
- No Rain Overlay

---
### Coming Soon
- No Fire Hud
